summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TikTok Comments Dashboard reporting system. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test reports via POST /api/reports/bulk after DELETE test cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reporting endpoints working: POST /api/reports, POST /api/reports/bulk, GET /api/reports (with filters: today, week, month, profile, sheet), GET /api/reports/stats, DELETE /api/reports. Frontend dashboard displays stats cards, Comments by Brand section, filter buttons, reports table with video links, auto-refresh toggle, and manual refresh button. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

backend: GET /api/reports/stats - returns dashboard statistics with all fields
GET /api/reports - returns all reports with pagination
POST /api/reports - accepts single comment report and persists
POST /api/reports/bulk - accepts multiple reports at once
frontend: Dashboard loads with correct title 'TikTok Comments Dashboard'
6 stats cards display correctly (Total, Today, Week, Profiles, Videos, Live Updates)
4 filter buttons present and clickable (All Time, Today, This Week, This Month)
Filter buttons toggle active state correctly
Reports table displays with correct columns (Time, Profile, Comment, Brand, Video)
Video links have target='_blank' for external navigation
Auto-refresh toggle switches between Live/Paused states
Manual refresh button triggers data reload
Comments by Brand section shows brand breakdown

design_review.header: Sticky header with semi-transparent background, good contrast
design_review.color_scheme: Dark theme (zinc-950 background) with good text contrast
design_review.responsive_grid: Stats cards use responsive 2/4/6 column grid
